deck:
* Isolated Buck (Flybuck) Converter - Generated by OpenMagnetics
* Vin=48V, Vout_pri=24V, f=100kHz, D=50 pct
* Lmag=251.429uH, 1 secondaries

* DC Input
Vin vin_dc 0 48

* §8a.5 input-current sense
Vq1_sense vin_dc q1_drain 0

* High-side Switch
Vpwm pwm_ctrl 0 PULSE(0 5 0 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 5e-06 1e-05)
.model SW1 SW VT=2.5 VH=0.5 RON=0.01 ROFF=1e+06
S1 q1_drain sw_node pwm_ctrl 0 SW1

* Low-side Switch (Synchronous Rectifier)
Vpwm_inv pwm_inv 0 PULSE(5 0 0 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 5e-06 1e-05)
.model SW2 SW VT=2.5 VH=0.5 RON=0.01 ROFF=1e+06
S2 sw_node 0 pwm_inv 0 SW2

* Coupled Inductor (Primary = Buck Inductor)
* Primary current sense
Vpri_sense sw_node pri_in 0
Lpri pri_in vpri_out 2.514286e-04

* Across-winding differential voltage probe (passive sign)
Bvpri_diff vpri_diff 0 V=V(pri_in)-V(vpri_out)

Lsec0 0 sec0_in 6.285715e-05
Kpri_sec0 Lpri Lsec0 1

* Diode model
.model DIDEAL D(IS=1.000000e-14 RS=1.000000e-02 N=1.0)

* Primary Output Stage (Buck - non-isolated)
Cpri vpri_out 0 100u IC=24
Rload_pri vpri_out 0 24

* Secondary 0 output stage (isolated)
Rsec0 sec0_in sec0_node 0.01
Dsec0 sec0_node sec0_rect DIDEAL
Vsec_sense0 sec0_rect vout0 0
Cout0 vout0 0 100u IC=12
Rload0 vout0 0 24

* Transient Analysis
.tran 5.000000e-08 7.201000e-02 7.200000e-02 UIC

* Output signals
.save v(sw_node) v(pri_in) v(vpri_out) v(vpri_diff) i(Vpri_sense) v(vin_dc) i(Vin) i(Vq1_sense) v(sec0_in) v(sec0_rect) i(Vsec_sense0) v(vout0)

.options RELTOL=0.001000 ABSTOL=1.000000e-09 VNTOL=1.000000e-06 ITL1=1000 ITL4=1000
.ic v(vpri_out)=24
.ic v(vout0)=12

.end
